title: The AI Race Just Got a SpaceX-Sized Twist

mentions.context_snippet: The first story is that XAI is being acquired by SpaceX...
XAI is being acquired by SpaceX... SpaceX wrote in its announcement post that it had acquired XAI...

mentions.context_snippet: The second main being all about OpenAI's new Codex app and the shifting paradigm of how we work with agents...

mentions.quoted_text: Codex app is a powerful new interface designed to effortlessly manage multiple agents at once, run work in parallel, and collaborate with agents over long-running tasks.

fact_value: collaborate with agents over long-running tasks

One of the things that happened with the launch of Claude Code about a year ago now is that developer behavior shifted away from graphical user interfaces and towards the terminal.

mentions.quoted_text: The update brings 10 second video generation, 720p resolution, and dramatically better audio.
mentions.context_snippet: XAI officially launched Grok Imagine 1.0 with new video generation and audio improvements.
They were recently approved to double the number of Starlink satellites to 15,000 by 2031.

mentions.quoted_text: Assembly AI's models lead the field in accuracy and quality so you can actually trust the data your product is built on.
mentions.context_snippet: If you're building anything with Voice AI, you need to know about Assembly AI. They've built the best speech-to-text and speech-understanding models in the industry.

mentions.quoted_text: Robots & Pencils is a company built to close that gap. They design and deliver intelligent, cloud-native systems powered by generative and agentic AI.
mentions.context_snippet: Thank you to today's sponsors, Assembly, Robots & Pencils, Blitzy, and Superintelligent.

mentions.quoted_text: Blitzy solves this with infinite code context, understanding your codebase down to the line level dependency across millions of lines of code.
mentions.context_snippet: Blitzy orchestrates thousands of agents that reason across your full codebase, delivering over 80% of every sprint autonomously.

mentions.quoted_text: Codex app is out for Mac. I'm surprised by how much I love it. It's a bigger step forward than I imagined.
mentions.context_snippet: Sam Altman tweeted about the Codex app and his excitement about AI.

mentions.quoted_text: I've been a diehard Terminal and Emacs user for many years, but since using the Codex app, going back to the Terminal has felt like going back in time.
mentions.context_snippet: Greg Brockman praised the Codex app as an agent-native interface for building.

mentions.quoted_text: Prominent AI encoding YouTuber and content creator Theo dropped a 22-minute video about how much he loved the product.
mentions.context_snippet: Theo compared the Codex app favorably to Cursor and called it a Cursor killer.
